description: Style NotePerfect for those casual outings, these leather sandals from arrow are all you need to pamper your feet with style and comfort.Product DetailsGrey sandals with criss- cross midfoot leather straps and a toe separatorPadded footbed with perforations and branding on the heelUpper stitched to the outsole for durabilityRubber outsole with patterned grooves and a pivot point on the toe regionMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
